title: Concentration
body:
## Introduction
Added borderless support for Minecraft 1.20.6+.

Version 1.0.0 requires [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium). Not supports Sodium on Fabric platform.  
Version 1.0.1 requires [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) as dependency.  
Version 1.0.2+ doesn't require any mods as dependencies!

## For Modpackers
You can use my mod in your modpack, however please don't provide the mod file directly, use mrpack instead.

## Screenshots
![Options page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4b0f864b9c94284180a6b2a2932920c699cc458.png)
(This page has been removed after 1.0.1, and borderless fullscreen replaced native fullscreen directly)


![New Config Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12d97f50ac893aa9cb6ccced1b45af3c3c1e6c5f.jpeg)
(This is the new config screen, NeoForge available without any dependency, Fabric requires ModMenu to open this page)
## Compatiblility
### Sodium
Totally fine, no conflicts.
### Embeddium
Totally fine, no conflicts.
### Vulkan Mod
As a user reported in [issue#7](https://github.com/DeeChael/Concentration/issues/7), the borderless fullscreen provided by Vulkan Mod not works. So I add compatibility with Vulkan Mod so that you can use Concentration as an alternative borderless fullscreen with Vulkan Mod.

## Known Issues 
~~The option text won't change when you press fullscreen shortcut in the options page.~~  This actually is sodium and embeddium problem not Concentration problem.
